content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1/5.6.3 WARN — Custom star-rating gate routes only 4-5★ users to the App Store write-review link (RatingGateView.swift:18-20) while diverting lower ratings to a private feedback form, and description.txt explicitly asks users to "rate us 5 stars"; this bypasses `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview` and filters negative feedback from the Store.

Pierre: Apple explicitly bans pre-filtering ratings by sentiment and directing only happy users to leave a review — this is a textbook 5.6.3 dark pattern, and the "rate us 5 stars" copy compounds the 5.6.1 marketing-manipulation risk. Fix by replacing the custom gate with `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview(in:)` (or the new `AppStore.requestReview`) shown unconditionally to all users, removing the itms-apps write-review deep link and the "5 stars" call-to-action from the description.
